message:
feat(crates): fix testkit pagination, add store repair and telemetry health tests

Testkit pagination fix:
- fixtures.rs: Fix json::paginated() has_more calculation — use
  requested page_size instead of actual item count on the current page
  to determine whether more pages exist. The old logic produced false
  positives on short final pages (e.g. 3 items on a page_size=5 request
  incorrectly indicated more data). Add page_size parameter to function
  signature and update all callers. Add dedicated test for short last
  page edge case
- streaming_fixture.rs: Minor formatting adjustment

Store repair tests (312 lines):
- repair.rs: Add 4 async acceptance tests for the repair controller:
  evaluate_zone_queues_repairs_for_objects_below_coverage,
  evaluate_zone_skips_healthy_objects,
  evaluate_zone_queues_multiple_deficit_objects_by_priority,
  plan_zone_produces_actions_for_deficit_objects
  Tests verify queue depth, priority ordering, and healthy-object
  exclusion using MemorySymbolStore

Telemetry health check tests (91 lines):
- export.rs: Add 7 contract tests for HealthResponse serialization:
  prometheus text format, required JSON fields, null message omission,
  unhealthy response failure inclusion, composite health evaluation,
  multi-check serialization, and version string fidelity

Also updates: Cargo.lock (new dev-deps), beads issue tracker timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
